guidelines.title: Objectionable Content
guidelines.description: Apps should not include content that is offensive, insensitive, upsetting, intended to disgust, in exceptionally poor taste, or just plain creepy.

guidelines.title: Defamatory/Discriminatory Content
guidelines.description: Defamatory, discriminatory, or mean-spirited content, including references or commentary about religion, race, sexual orientation, gender, national/ethnic origin, or other targeted groups.

guidelines.title: False Information
guidelines.description: Apps that include false information, features, or misleading metadata will be rejected.

guidelines.title: User Generated Content
guidelines.description: Apps with user-generated content must include: content filtering, mechanism for reporting, ability to block abusive users, contact info for reporting.

guidelines.title: Kids Category
guidelines.description: Kids Category apps must not include third-party analytics, ads, or links out of the app.

guidelines.title: Privacy - Location Services
guidelines.description: Apps that use location services must provide a clear purpose string.

guidelines.title: Privacy - Contacts
guidelines.description: Apps accessing contacts must declare usage.

guidelines.title: Privacy - Camera
guidelines.description: Apps using camera must provide usage description.

guidelines.title: Privacy - Microphone
guidelines.description: Apps using microphone must provide usage description.

guidelines.title: Privacy - Photos
guidelines.description: Apps accessing photo library must declare usage.

guidelines.title: Privacy - HealthKit
guidelines.description: HealthKit apps must not store health data in iCloud and must provide usage descriptions.

guidelines.title: Privacy - Bluetooth
guidelines.description: Apps using Bluetooth must declare usage.

guidelines.title: Privacy - HomeKit/SiriKit
guidelines.description: HomeKit data must not be used for advertising or data mining.

guidelines.title: Privacy - App Tracking Transparency
guidelines.description: Apps must use ATTrackingManager.requestTrackingAuthorization before accessing IDFA.

guidelines.title: Privacy Manifest
guidelines.description: Apps must include a privacy manifest declaring required reason APIs used.

guidelines.title: Privacy - Data Collection
guidelines.description: App Privacy nutrition label on App Store Connect must accurately reflect data collection practices.

guidelines.title: Data Security
guidelines.description: Apps should use ATS (HTTPS). Insecure HTTP connections require justification.

guidelines.title: App Completeness
guidelines.description: App must be complete - no placeholder content, broken links, or unfinished features.

guidelines.title: Debug/Test Code
guidelines.description: Ensure debug/test code is properly guarded and not active in release builds.

guidelines.title: Beta/Demo/Trial
guidelines.description: Apps that are beta, demo, trial, or test versions will be rejected.

guidelines.title: Accurate Metadata
guidelines.description: App description, screenshots, and previews must accurately reflect the app.

guidelines.title: Hidden Features
guidelines.description: Don't include hidden or undocumented features. App functionality should match description.

guidelines.title: Accurate Screenshots
guidelines.description: Screenshots must show the app in use, not just marketing graphics.

guidelines.title: Hardware Compatibility
guidelines.description: App should be compatible with declared hardware requirements.

guidelines.title: IPv6 Compatibility
guidelines.description: Apps must support IPv6 networking. Hardcoded IPv4 addresses may cause rejection.

guidelines.title: Multitasking Support
guidelines.description: iPad apps must support multitasking (Slide Over, Split View).

guidelines.title: In-App Purchase
guidelines.description: Digital content, subscriptions, and unlockable features MUST use Apple IAP.

guidelines.title: External Payment Links
guidelines.description: Apps may not use external payment for digital goods/subscriptions (except entitlement linking in certain regions).

guidelines.title: Subscription Requirements
guidelines.description: Auto-renewable subscriptions must: clearly display terms, have restore mechanism, explain subscription management.

guidelines.title: Restore Purchases
guidelines.description: Apps with IAP must include a mechanism to restore previously purchased content.

guidelines.title: Other Business Model Issues
guidelines.description: Ensure business model is clear and doesn't mislead users.

guidelines.title: App Icon
guidelines.description: App must include a 1024x1024 app icon.

guidelines.title: Copycats
guidelines.description: Don't copy other apps or use trademarked content.

guidelines.title: Minimum Functionality
guidelines.description: App must provide value beyond a simple website or marketing material.

guidelines.title: Not a Website Wrapper
guidelines.description: App should not be a repackaged website.

guidelines.title: Sign in with Apple
guidelines.description: Apps using third-party login (Google, Facebook, etc.) MUST also offer Sign in with Apple.

guidelines.title: Third-Party Software
guidelines.description: Third-party code/frameworks must comply with guidelines.

guidelines.title: Privacy Policy
guidelines.description: All apps must have a privacy policy. Apps with IAP or subscriptions especially.

guidelines.title: Data Collection Disclosure
guidelines.description: Apps must clearly describe what data is collected and how it's used.

guidelines.title: Data Use and Sharing
guidelines.description: Third-party analytics must be disclosed in privacy policy and App Privacy card.

guidelines.title: Intellectual Property
guidelines.description: Ensure all content (images, music, video) is properly licensed.

guidelines.title: Gaming/Gambling
guidelines.description: Gambling apps require geo-restrictions and appropriate licensing.

guidelines.title: Developer Code of Conduct
guidelines.description: Treat everyone with respect. Don't manipulate reviews or engage in fraudulent behavior.

guidelines.title: Entitlements
guidelines.description: Entitlements file must exist and match app capabilities.

guidelines.title: Info.plist
guidelines.description: Info.plist must exist with required keys.

guidelines.title: Deprecated APIs
guidelines.description: Deprecated APIs (UIWebView, UIAlertView, etc.) cause automatic rejection.

guidelines.title: Third-Party Dependencies
guidelines.description: Third-party SDKs must include privacy manifests and be up to date.

guidelines.title: Descriptions
guidelines.description: All configured locales must have descriptions (>50 chars) and keywords (>10 chars).

guidelines.title: App Name & Subtitle
guidelines.description: App name (<=30 chars) and subtitle (<=30 chars) must be set for all locales.

guidelines.title: Copyright
guidelines.description: Copyright must be set on the app version.

guidelines.title: Screenshots
guidelines.description: Screenshots must be uploaded for all locales.

guidelines.title: Support URL
guidelines.description: Support URL must be set and reachable.

guidelines.title: Privacy Policy URL
guidelines.description: Privacy policy URL must be set and reachable.

guidelines.title: Marketing URL
guidelines.description: Marketing URL should be set and reachable.

guidelines.title: Terms of Use in Description
guidelines.description: Descriptions should include links to privacy policy and terms of use.

guidelines.title: Privacy Policy Content
guidelines.description: Privacy policy page must contain actual privacy policy content (data collection, usage, retention).

guidelines.title: Terms of Service Content
guidelines.description: Terms page must contain actual terms of service content.

guidelines.title: Subscription Terms (iTunes/Apple)
guidelines.description: Terms must state: Payment charged to iTunes Account upon confirmation of purchase.

guidelines.title: Auto-Renewal Terms
guidelines.description: Terms must state: Subscription auto-renews unless turned off 24 hours before end of current period.

guidelines.title: Subscription Management
guidelines.description: Terms must explain how to manage subscriptions via Account Settings.

guidelines.title: Cancellation Policy
guidelines.description: Terms must state cancellation policy for active subscription period.

guidelines.title: Free Trial Terms
guidelines.description: If free trial offered, terms must state unused portion is forfeited upon purchase.

guidelines.title: Contact Email
guidelines.description: Contact page must display a working email address.

guidelines.title: Privacy - Data Collection Details
guidelines.description: Privacy policy should detail what data is collected, how it's used, and retention policy.

guidelines.title: Privacy - Contact Info
guidelines.description: Privacy policy should include contact information for privacy inquiries.
